---
published: true
title: Photo Grid — Component Demo
subtitle: CMS Editor Component Preview
description: Visual demo of all four Dynamic Photo Grid layouts. Safe to delete
  after PR review.
intro: All four slot-count layouts rendered with real site images. The callout
  tile shows all three gradient options.
button_text: test
button_link: ""
marquee_items: []
marquee_mode: dark
---
## 2-Slot — Side by Side

<!-- pgrid:eyJpbWFnZV8xIjoiL2Fzc2V0cy9pbWcvdGtkdW5pdi10ZWVuLWJsYWNrLWJlbHRzLW1heTI2LndlYnAiLCJhbHRfMSI6IlRlZW4gYmxhY2sgYmVsdHMiLCJpbWFnZV8yIjoiL2Fzc2V0cy9pbWcvdGtkdW5pdl9hbGV4LWJydW1sZXkud2VicCIsImFsdF8yIjoiQWxleCBCcnVtbGV5Iiwi aW1hZ2VfMyI6IiIsImFsdF8zIjoiIiwiaW1hZ2VfNCI6IiIsImFsdF80IjoiIiwiaW1hZ2VfNSI6IiIsImFsdF81IjoiIiwiY2FsbG91dF9zdGF0IjoiIiwiY2FsbG91dF9sYWJlbCI6IiIsImNhbGxvdXRfc3R5bGUiOiJnb2xkIn0= -->
<div class="tw-photo-grid tw-photo-grid--2">
  <div class="tw-pg-s1"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-teen-black-belts-may26.webp" alt="Teen black belts" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s2"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv_alex-brumley.webp" alt="Alex Brumley" loading="lazy"></div>
</div>

---

## 3-Slot — Wide Top + Two Below

<!-- pgrid: -->
<div class="tw-photo-grid tw-photo-grid--3">
  <div class="tw-pg-s1"><img src="/assets/img/banner/team-positive.png" alt="Team positive" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s2"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-teen-black-belts-may26.webp" alt="Teen black belts" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s3"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-young-black-belt-fam.jpg" alt="Young black belt family" loading="lazy"></div>
</div>

---

## 4-Slot — 2×2 with Gold Callout

<!-- pgrid: -->
<div class="tw-photo-grid tw-photo-grid--4">
  <div class="tw-pg-s1"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-teen-black-belts-may26.webp" alt="Teen black belts" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s2"><img src="/assets/img/banner/team-positive.png" alt="Team positive" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s3"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-young-black-belt-fam.jpg" alt="Young family" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s4 tw-pg-callout tw-pg-callout--gold">
    <span class="tw-pg-stat">40+</span>
    <span class="tw-pg-label">Years on the mat</span>
  </div>
</div>

---

## 4-Slot — 2×2 with Charcoal Callout

<!-- pgrid: -->
<div class="tw-photo-grid tw-photo-grid--4">
  <div class="tw-pg-s1"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-teen-black-belts-may26.webp" alt="Teen black belts" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s2"><img src="/assets/img/banner/team-positive.png" alt="Team positive" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s3"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-young-black-belt-fam.jpg" alt="Young family" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s4 tw-pg-callout tw-pg-callout--charcoal">
    <span class="tw-pg-stat">1000+</span>
    <span class="tw-pg-label">Black belts earned</span>
  </div>
</div>

---

## 5-Slot — Design System Layout with Gold Callout

<!-- pgrid: -->
<div class="tw-photo-grid tw-photo-grid--5">
  <div class="tw-pg-s1"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-teen-black-belts-may26.webp" alt="Teen black belts" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s2"><img src="/assets/img/banner/team-positive.png" alt="Team positive" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s3"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-young-black-belt-fam.jpg" alt="Young family" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s4 tw-pg-callout tw-pg-callout--gold">
    <span class="tw-pg-stat">40+</span>
    <span class="tw-pg-label">Years on the mat</span>
  </div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s5"><img src="/assets/img/banner/team-positive2.png" alt="Team" loading="lazy"></div>
</div>

---

## 5-Slot — Design System Layout with Red Callout

<!-- pgrid: -->
<div class="tw-photo-grid tw-photo-grid--5">
  <div class="tw-pg-s1"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-teen-black-belts-may26.webp" alt="Teen black belts" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s2"><img src="/assets/img/banner/team-positive.png" alt="Team positive" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s3"><img src="/assets/img/tkduniv-young-black-belt-fam.jpg" alt="Young family" loading="lazy"></div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s4 tw-pg-callout tw-pg-callout--red">
    <span class="tw-pg-stat">38</span>
    <span class="tw-pg-label">Years of champions</span>
  </div>
  <div class="tw-pg-s5"><img src="/assets/img/banner/team-positive2.png" alt="Team" loading="lazy"></div>
</div>
